toastRoutineCreatedBody: Add the first trigger to turn it into a live workflow.
toastUpdateFailedBody: Paperclip could not update the routine.
toastRunFailedBody: Paperclip could not start the routine run.
selectCompany: Select a company to view routines.
heading: Routines
subtitle: Recurring work definitions that materialize into auditable execution issues.
newRoutineHint: Define the recurring work first. Trigger setup comes next on the detail page.
advancedDeliveryHint: Keep policy controls secondary to the work definition.
afterCreationHint: After creation, Paperclip takes you straight to trigger setup for schedules, webhooks, or internal runs.
empty: No routines yet. Use Create routine to define the first recurring workflow.
detail.toastSaveFailedBody: Paperclip could not save the routine.
detail.toastRunFailedBody: Paperclip could not start the routine run.
detail.toastUpdateFailedBody: Paperclip could not update the routine.
detail.toastTriggerFailedBody: Paperclip could not create the trigger.
detail.toastTriggerSavedBody: The routine cadence update was saved.
detail.toastTriggerUpdateFailedBody: Paperclip could not update the trigger.
detail.toastTriggerDeleteFailedBody: Paperclip could not delete the trigger.
detail.toastRotateFailedBody: Paperclip could not rotate the webhook secret.
detail.selectCompany: Select a company to view routines.
schedule.cron_help: Five fields: minute hour day-of-month month day-of-week
run_dialog.title: Run routine
run_dialog.description: Fill in the routine variables before starting the execution issue.
run_dialog.choose_workspace: Choose an existing workspace before running.
variables.title: Variables
variables.detected_hint: Detected from `{{name}}` placeholders in the routine instructions.
variables.prompt_hint: Prompt the user for this value before each manual run.
variables.label: Label
variables.placeholder_hint: Use `{{variable_name}}` placeholders in the instructions to prompt for inputs when the routine runs.
policy.coalesce_if_active: If a run is already active, keep just one follow-up run queued.
policy.always_enqueue: Queue every trigger occurrence, even if the routine is already running.
policy.skip_if_active: Drop new trigger occurrences while a run is still active.
policy.skip_missed: Ignore windows that were missed while the scheduler or routine was paused.
policy.enqueue_missed_with_cap: Catch up missed schedule windows in capped batches after recovery.
